examples: Thousands attended the beatification of Juan Diego.
More than a million people descended on Rome to take part in the beatification ceremony of the late Pope John Paul II.
JOHN PAUL II's beatification on May 1st will be the most exalted ceremony at the Vatican since his funeral six years ago.
Its first public ceremony was the beatification of San Isidro, the patron saint of the city.
The church process to certify a first miracle needed for John Paul's beatification went exceptionally fast.
